topics.name: Scarcity, Choice, and Opportunity Cost
topics.description: Why economics exists: limited resources, trade-offs, incentives, marginal thinking.

topics.name: Supply, Demand, and Market Equilibrium
topics.description: How prices are determined through supply and demand, including elasticity and market adjustments.

topics.name: Consumer Behavior
topics.description: How individuals make choices based on preferences, utility, and budget constraints.

topics.name: Firm Behavior and Production
topics.description: How firms produce goods, manage costs, and maximize profits.

topics.name: Market Structures
topics.description: Different types of markets and how competition and pricing power vary across them.

topics.name: Market Failures and Externalities
topics.description: When markets fail to allocate resources efficiently and the role of government intervention.

topics.name: Game Theory and Strategic Interaction
topics.description: How agents make decisions in strategic settings involving competition and cooperation.

topics.name: Macroeconomic Foundations
topics.description: Understanding aggregate economic indicators like GDP, inflation, and unemployment.

topics.name: Money, Banking, and Monetary Policy
topics.description: How money systems work and how central banks influence the economy.

topics.name: Fiscal Policy, Growth, and International Economics
topics.description: Government spending, taxation, economic growth, and global trade dynamics.

subjects.name: Japanese 1
subjects.description: Basic japanese to get to intermediate level

topics.name: Hiragana, Katakana, and Basic Kanji
topics.description: Learn the Japanese writing systems and how sounds map to characters.

topics.name: Pronunciation and Phonetics
topics.description: Sound patterns, pitch accent basics, and correct reading of words.

topics.name: Basic Sentence Structure
topics.description: Understanding SOV order, particles (は, が, を, に), and simple sentence formation.

topics.name: Core Vocabulary
topics.description: Essential everyday words for survival conversation and comprehension.

topics.name: Verb and Adjective Conjugation
topics.description: Present, past, negative forms, and polite vs casual speech.

topics.name: Particles in Depth
topics.description: Nuanced usage of particles like は vs が, に vs で, and more.

topics.name: Complex Sentence Structures
topics.description: Connecting ideas using て-form, clauses, and relative sentences.

topics.name: Listening and Speaking Skills
topics.description: Understanding spoken Japanese and forming natural responses.

topics.name: Kanji and Reading Comprehension
topics.description: Learning common kanji and improving reading ability.

topics.name: Intermediate Grammar and Expression
topics.description: Nuanced expressions, casual vs formal tone, and real-world usage.
